    Index

    C I S 
    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages

    I

    Input - Klasse in ch.tbz.lib
    Input Methods like the BASIC INPUT (or c's scanf()).
    Input() - Konstruktor für Klasse ch.tbz.lib.Input
     
    inputBoolean(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.tbz.lib.Input
    Asks for a decision.
    inputByte(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.tbz.lib.Input
    Asks for a byte value
    inputChar(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.tbz.lib.Input
    Asks for a single char.
    inputDate(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.tbz.lib.Input
    Asks for a single date data, formatted like tt.mm.yyyy
    inputDateTime(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.tbz.lib.Input
    Asks for a single date and time data, formatted like tt.mm.yyyy hh:mm:ss
    inputDouble(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.tbz.lib.Input
    Asks for a double value
    inputFloat(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.tbz.lib.Input
    Asks for a float value
    inputInt(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.tbz.lib.Input
    Asks for a int value
    inputLong(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.tbz.lib.Input
    Asks for a long value
    inputShort(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.tbz.lib.Input
    Asks for a short value
    inputString(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.tbz.lib.Input
    Asks for a string value
    inputTime(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.tbz.lib.Input
    Asks for a single time data, formatted like hh:mm:ss
